title: Munder Difflin hire manifest (v1)
description: A portable, shareable agent role template for the Munder Difflin multi-agent harness. A manifest never auto-spawns an agent: importing it only pre-fills the Add-Agent modal for human review.

spec.description: Spec version tag. Exactly this string for v1.

name.description: Agent display name; also seeds the hive agent id.

description.description: One-line role, e.g. "Documentation writer". Lands in identity.md and the agent card.

goal.description: Standing goal/mission text pre-filled into the goal field.

character.description: Office cast sprite id (michael, jim, pam, dwight, kevin, angela, oscar, stanley, phyllis, andy, kelly, ryan, toby, creed, meredith). Unknown values fall back to the default sprite.

accent.description: Accent color name (coral, mint, sky, lemon, lilac, peach). Unknown values fall back to the default.

provider.description: Which CLI the role is designed for. 'agy' is an alias for 'antigravity'. 'custom' is deliberately not allowed — a manifest can never choose an arbitrary local binary.

model.description: Model id/label for the provider, e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6" or "Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)". Restricted charset: it goes onto the spawn command line, so shell metacharacters are rejected.

commandFlags.description: Extra flag-shaped args appended to the LOCALLY-built spawn command (the binary always comes from the user's provider preset). The first entry must start with '-'. No quotes, whitespace, or shell metacharacters; args are passed as argv, never through a shell.

capabilities.description: Capability tags written to the hive registry (routing hints for the GOD orchestrator).

isolate.description: Spawn the agent in its own isolated git worktree.

tokenCap.description: Per-agent total-token ceiling, applied to the harness's agentTokenCaps after spawn.

author.description: Attribution shown in the import preview.

homepage.description: Manifest home page (e.g. its gallery card). https only.

skills.description: Bundled skill ids to activate in the agent's workspace. References into the BUNDLED_SKILL_IDS allowlist only — never raw file paths. Only the built-in safe (read-only, no-secret) skills may be listed.

mcpServers.description: Default MCP catalog ids to enable for this agent. References into the MCP_CATALOG allowlist only — never raw specs. Safe-readonly entries (sequential-thinking, time, fetch, context7, filesystem, git) are pre-filled; write/secret entries (github-token, db, email-calendar, search-with-key) are surfaced for human consent at import and never auto-enabled.
